name: Muhammad Alan Nur
title: Founder Stezio | CS @ UW | Prev SWE @ TikTok (Tokopedia) | Robotics & AI
bio: Currently pursuing an MS in Robotics at UW, with a background in information technology, Computer Science, and business administration, bringing strong analytical skills and an entrepreneurial, trustworthy approach to Product Management.

Founder of Tulibot, an award-winning assistive tech platform (Google, Meta, Microsoft) for 5,000+ users. Experienced in Product Management and full-lifecycle product development, setting product vision, defining product requirements, driving research, quantitative analysis, and Market Analysis.

Skilled at mapping industry trends into opportunities and ideating creative solutions, while collaborating across product design, user experience, and technical development to develop features and use performance metrics and user satisfaction signals to iterate from concept to scaling.
